content:
# Organic Geochemistry

**Summary**: The study of the chemical composition and origin of organic matter in sedimentary rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] utilized organic-geochemistry to characterize source rock quality.

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] analyzed the role of organic content and maturity in carbonate mudrock response to CO2.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] ['biomarker analysis', 'pyrolysis', 'kerogen typing']

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] analyzed the role of organic content and maturity in carbonate mudrock response to CO2.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] ['rock-eval-pyrolysis', 'gc-ms']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Analysis confirmed a marine, anoxic environment for the carbonate mudrocks. ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 83]])

- Determined how organic richness affects the chemical signature of the rock during CO2 interaction. ([[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025, p. 71]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Distinguishing between true maturity and effects of mineral catalysis in carbonates.

## Open Questions and Research Gaps
